
--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"data":{},"pending":[{"id":"1","path":[]}],"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"products":[{"__typename":"Consultancy","lead":{"__typename":"Employee","id":1,"derivedMood":"HAPPY"},"isLeadAvailable":false},{"__typename":"Cosmo"},{"__typename":"SDK"}]},"id":"1"}],"completed":[{"id":"1"}],"hasNext":false}

--graphql
--graphql--
